pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java compiler target and source version to 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; compiling with JDK 11 settings on JDK 17 may produce warnings or fail if strict release flags are enforced, and the codebase likely uses features or APIs available in JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Kotlin compiler version to 1.9.22 to support the new JDK and modern Kotlin features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions (1.3.x) do not support JDK 17 bytecode generation or language features required by the new codebase, leading to compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot dependencies and the Spring Kotlin compiler plugin as the project migrates away from the Spring framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is switching to Ktor; keeping Spring dependencies causes classpath conflicts and unnecessary bloat, and the Spring compiler plugin is no longer needed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Ktor client dependencies to replace the removed Spring Web client functionality.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application requires an HTTP client for making requests; without Ktor, the code referencing Ktor APIs will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson dependencies to version 2.17.0 to ensure compatibility with the new Ktor serialization and security standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have security vulnerabilities or incompatibilities with newer Ktor serialization modules, causing runtime or compile-time errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.12 to align with the new logging API standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.7.x is incompatible with some newer logging backends and may cause runtime linkage errors or missing method exceptions in a JDK 17 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove OIDC support dependencies that were tied to the Spring framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `oidc-spring-support` library depends on Spring; removing Spring requires removing this library to avoid compile-time errors due to missing Spring classes.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace Spring RestTemplate with Ktor HttpClient for HTTP requests
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Spring RestTemplate is synchronous and relies on Spring Web infrastructure which is being removed in favor of Ktor's asynchronous client model
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before:
import org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate
private val restTemplateBuilder = context.restTemplateBuilder
val respons = failsafeRestTemplate.exchange(...)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove Spring Security context dependency for authentication
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The class no longer uses Spring's `OidcRequestContextHolder` to retrieve tokens, instead accepting tokens as method arguments

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update imports to use Ktor and new internal model classes
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Old Spring and internal utility imports are invalid or replaced by Ktor equivalents and new model structures

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor method signatures to accept explicit tokens and subjects
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Methods no longer rely on thread-local Spring context for user identity, requiring explicit parameters
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before: fun hentOrganisasjoner(serviceCode: ServiceCode, serviceEdition: ServiceEdition): List<AltinnOrganisasjon>
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: fun hentOrganisasjoner(selvbetjeningToken: Token, subject: Subject, ...): List<AltinnReportee>

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add Ktor ContentNegotiation plugin for JSON serialization
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Ktor requires explicit configuration for JSON serialization, replacing Spring's automatic conversion

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update error handling to use Ktor ResponseException

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: URL building logic changed from Spring's UriComponentsBuilder to string manipulation and Ktor URL handling
